reviews.comment:
Muy buena estacion de servicio de combustible. La contra es que en temporada alta de turistas hay mucha cola para cargar combustible y que esta cola hay que hacerla casi pegado a la banquina de la calle con los riesgos que eso significa.

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station. The downside is that during peak tourist season there are very long lines to fill up, and you have to wait in line almost next to the shoulder of the road, which is risky.
